sqlMap.select:
select type_id, used from tbl_journal_form_type where tenant_id=#tenantId# and company_id=#companyId#
and used=#used#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_journal_form_type (type_id, used, company_id, tenant_id) values (#typeId#, 'use', #companyId#, #tenantId#)
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_form_type set used=#used# where type_id = #typeId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

isEmpty.isEqual: select distinct a.form_id, a.form_name, a.form_info, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(a.form_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as form_date, a.form_writer, a.form_status, a.type_id from tbl_journal_form a join tbl_journal_form_type b on (a.company_id = b.company_id and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) where b.used = 'use' and a.form_status = 'basic' and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and a.company_id = #companyId#
isEmpty.isNotEqual: select form_id, form_name, form_info, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(form_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as form_date, form_writer, form_status, type_id from tbl_journal_form where type_id = #typeId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by form_id desc

select.isNotEmpty: select a.form_id, a.form_name, a.form_info, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(a.form_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as form_date, a.form_writer, a.form_status, a.type_id from tbl_journal_form a left join tbl_journal_form_use_dept b on (a.form_id = b.form_id and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) where (b.dept_id = #deptId# or b.dept_id is null) and a.type_id = #typeId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: select b.dept_id, a.DISPLAYNAME as dept_name from tbl_deptmaster a join tbl_journal_form_use_dept b on a.CN = b.dept_id where b.form_id = #formId# and b.tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
insert into tbl_journal_form ( tenant_id, form_name, form_content, type_id, form_date, form_writer, form_info, company_id ) values ( #tenantId#, #formName#, #formContent#, #typeId#, #writeDate#, #formWriter#, #formDescript#, #companyId# )
select last_insert_id()
insert into tbl_journal_form_use_dept ( dept_id, form_id, tenant_id ) values ( #deptId#, #formId#, #tenantId# )
sqlMap.select:
select d.CN as id, IF(d.extensionattribute1=null
or d.CN=#companyId#
,'##',d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1) as parent, d.extensionattribute2 as companyId, d.displayname as text ,case d.CN when d.extensionattribute2 then 'comp' else 'dept' end as isComp ,case d.CN when u.DEPARTMENT then 'yes' else 'no' end as myDept from tbl_deptmaster d left join tbl_usermaster u on d.tenant_id=u.TENANT_ID where d.tenant_id=#tenantId# and u.CN=#userId# and u.tenant_id=#tenantId# and (((substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1,3,1)=0 and d.extensionattribute2=u.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) or (substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1,3,1)=1))
and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2=#companyId#
ORDER BY lpad(ifnull(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15,0),6,0) ,d.DISPLAYNAME

select d.CN as companyId, d.displayname as companyName ,case d.CN when #companyId# then 'selected' else 'no' end as selected from jmocha.tbl_deptmaster d left join jmocha.tbl_usermaster u on d.tenant_id=u.TENANT_ID where d.TENANT_ID=#tenantId# and u.CN=#userId# and u.TENANT_ID=#tenantId# and (((substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1,3,1)=0 and d.extensionattribute2=u.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) or (substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1,3,1)=1)) and d.extensionattribute2=d.CN order by lpad(ifnull(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15,0),6,0) ,d.DISPLAYNAME

select a.user_id as user_id, u.DISPLAYNAME as user_name, u.title as jikwi, du.DISPLAYNAME as dept_name, group_concat(d.DISPLAYNAME order by 1 separator '%') as auth_dept from jmocha.tbl_usermaster u inner join jmocha.tbl_journal_auth a on (u.CN=a.user_id and u.TENANT_ID=a.tenant_id) inner join jmocha.tbl_deptmaster d on (a.dept_id=d.CN and a.tenant_id=d.TENANT_ID) inner join jmocha.tbl_deptmaster du on (du.CN = u.DEPARTMENT and u.TENANT_ID=du.TENANT_ID) where a.tenant_id=#tenantId# and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2=#companyId# group by user_id

select d.DISPLAYNAME dept_name, d.CN dept_id, 'no' as mine from jmocha.tbl_deptmaster d left join jmocha.tbl_journal_auth a on (d.CN=a.dept_id and a.tenant_id=d.TENANT_ID) where a.user_id = #userId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# union select d.DISPLAYNAME dept_name, d.CN dept_id, 'yes' as mine from jmocha.tbl_deptmaster d left join jmocha.tbl_usermaster u on (d.CN=u.DEPARTMENT and u.TENANT_ID=d.TENANT_ID) where u.CN=#userId# and u.TENANT_ID=#tenantId# order by dept_name

select DISPLAYNAME as user_name, CN as user_id, TITLE as jikwi, MAIL as mail, DESCRIPTION as dept_name, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as user_img from tbl_usermaster where TENANT_ID=#tenantId# and $key$ like concat('%',#value#,'%') order by lpad(ifnull(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15,0),6,0) ,DISPLAYNAME
select form_id, form_name, form_info, form_content, form_status from tbl_journal_form where tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId# and form_id = #formId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_form set form_name = #formName#, form_info = #formDescript#, form_content = #formContent# where form_id = #formId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_form_use_dept where form_id = #formId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
delete from tbl_journal_form where form_id = #formId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into jmocha.tbl_journal_auth (user_id, dept_id, tenant_id) select #userId#, #deptId#, #tenantId# from dual where not exists( select DISPLAYNAME from jmocha.tbl_usermaster where CN=#userId# and DEPARTMENT=#deptId# and tenant_id=#tenantId#)
sqlMap.delete: delete from jmocha.tbl_journal_auth where user_id=#userId# and tenant_id=#tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select count(*) from jmocha.tbl_journal_recv where user_id=#userId# and TENANT_ID=#tenantId# and recv_status='Y' and isnull(recieve_date)

select count(j.journal_id) as totalCount from jmocha.tbl_journal j inner join jmocha.tbl_journal_form f on (j.form_id=f.form_id and j.tenant_id = f.tenant_id) inner join jmocha.tbl_journal_form_type ft on (f.type_id=ft.type_id and f.tenant_id=ft.tenant_id) inner join jmocha.tbl_deptmaster d on (j.journal_dept=d.CN and d.TENANT_ID=j.tenant_id) inner join jmocha.tbl_usermaster u on (j.journal_writer=u.CN and u.TENANT_ID=j.tenant_id)
left join jmocha.tbl_journal_recv r on (r.journal_id=j.journal_id and j.tenant_id=r.tenant_id)
where j.tenant_id=#tenantId# and ft.company_id=#companyId#
and ft.type_id=#typeId#
and j.journal_writer=#journalWriter#
and d.CN=#deptId#
and r.user_id=#recvUser# and r.recv_status = 'Y'
and j.journal_status=#status#
and j.journal_status is null
and f.form_id=#formId#
and u.DISPLAYNAME like concat('%',#writerName#,'%')
and j.journal_title like concat('%',#journalTitle#,'%')
and f.form_name like concat('%',#formName#,'%')
and (date(j.journal_date) between #startDate# and #endDate#)
and (date(j.journal_date) like #startDate#)
and (date(j.journal_date) like #endDate#)
and dept_share='Y'

select j.journal_id as journal_id, j.journal_title as journal_title, substring(j.journal_date,1,19) as journal_date, j.dept_share as dept_share, u.DISPLAYNAME as writer_name, d.DISPLAYNAME as dept_name, f.form_name as form_name, ft.type_id as type_id, (select count(jr.reply_id) from jmocha.tbl_journal_reply jr where jr.journal_id=j.journal_id and jr.tenant_id=j.tenant_id) as reply_count, (select count(jf.file_id) from jmocha.tbl_journal_file jf where jf.journal_id=j.journal_id and jf.tenant_id=j.tenant_id) as file_count, (select count(v.user_id) from jmocha.tbl_journal_view v where v.journal_id=j.journal_id and v.tenant_id=j.tenant_id) as view_count, (select count(r.user_id) from jmocha.tbl_journal_recv r where r.journal_id=j.journal_id and r.tenant_id=j.tenant_id) as total_recv, (select count(r.recieve_date) from jmocha.tbl_journal_recv r where r.journal_id=j.journal_id and r.tenant_id=j.tenant_id) as check_recv, ifnull((select recieve_date as is_view from jmocha.tbl_journal_recv where user_id=#userId# and tenant_id=j.tenant_id and journal_id=j.journal_id union select view_date as is_view from jmocha.tbl_journal_view where user_id=#userId# and tenant_id=j.tenant_id and journal_id=j.journal_id union select journal_date from jmocha.tbl_journal where journal_writer=#userId# and journal_id=j.journal_id and tenant_id = j.tenant_id ),'noView') as is_view , f.form_status as form_status from jmocha.tbl_journal j inner join jmocha.tbl_journal_form f on (j.form_id=f.form_id and j.tenant_id = f.tenant_id) inner join jmocha.tbl_journal_form_type ft on (f.type_id=ft.type_id and f.tenant_id=ft.tenant_id) inner join jmocha.tbl_deptmaster d on (j.journal_dept=d.CN and d.TENANT_ID=j.tenant_id) inner join jmocha.tbl_usermaster u on (j.journal_writer=u.CN and u.TENANT_ID=j.tenant_id)
left join jmocha.tbl_journal_recv r on (r.journal_id=j.journal_id and r.tenant_id=j.tenant_id)
where j.tenant_id=#tenantId# and ft.company_id=#companyId#
and ft.type_id=#typeId#
and j.journal_writer=#journalWriter#
and d.CN=#deptId#
and r.user_id=#recvUser# and r.recv_status = 'Y'
and j.journal_status=#status#
and NULLIF(j.journal_status,'') is null
and f.form_id=#formId#
and u.DISPLAYNAME like concat('%',#writerName#,'%')
and j.journal_title like concat('%',#journalTitle#,'%')
and f.form_name like concat('%',#formName#,'%')
and (date(j.journal_date) between #startDate# and #endDate#)
and (date(j.journal_date) like #startDate#)
and (date(j.journal_date) like #endDate#)
and dept_share='Y'
group by 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,14,15
order by 3 desc
order by $orderNum$ $orderHow$
limit #startCount#,#listCnt#
sqlMap.insert:
insert into tbl_journal_recv_favorite ( tenant_id, user_id, favorite_name, favorite_date ) values ( #tenantId#, #userId#, #favoriteName#, #nowDate# )
select last_insert_id()
insert into tbl_journal_recv_favorite_list ( favorite_id, user_id, tenant_id ) values ( #favoriteId#, #userId#, #tenantId# )
sqlMap.select: select favorite_id, favorite_name, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(favorite_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as favorite_date from tbl_journal_recv_favorite where user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by favorite_id asc

select a.DISPLAYNAME as user_name, a.DISPLAYNAME2 as user_name2, a.CN as user_id, a.TITLE as jikwi, a.MAIL as mail, a.DESCRIPTION as dept_name from tbl_usermaster a join tbl_journal_recv_favorite_list b on (a.CN = b.user_id and a.TENANT_ID = b.tenant_id) where b.favorite_id = #favoriteId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_recv_favorite_list where favorite_id = #favoriteId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_recv_favorite set favorite_name = #favoriteName# where favorite_id = #favoriteId# and user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_recv_favorite where favorite_id = #favoriteId# and user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select count(user_id) ,ifnull(list_cnt,20) as list_cnt ,ifnull(viewenv,'NONE') as viewenv ,ifnull(recv_alert,'Y') as recv_alert ,ifnull(reply_alert,'Y') as reply_alert ,ifnull(preview_wcontent,'50') as preview_wcontent ,ifnull(preview_hcontent,'50') as preview_hcontent from jmocha.tbl_journal_env where user_id=#userId# and tenant_id=#tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO jmocha.tbl_journal_env (user_id, tenant_id
,list_cnt
,viewenv
,reply_alert
,recv_alert
,preview_wcontent
,preview_hcontent
) VALUES (#userId#, #tenantId#
,#listCnt#
,#viewenv#
,#replyAlert#
,#recvAlert#
,#previewWcontent#
,#previewHcontent#
) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id=#userId#
,list_cnt=#listCnt#
,viewenv=#viewenv#
,reply_alert=#replyAlert#
,recv_alert=#recvAlert#
,preview_wcontent=#previewWcontent#
,preview_hcontent=#previewHcontent#
sqlMap.select: select a.form_id from tbl_journal a join tbl_journal_form b on (a.form_id = b.form_id and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) where a.journal_writer = #userId# and b.type_id = #typeId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# order by a.journal_id desc limit 1

insert.selectKey: select user_id from jmocha.tbl_journal_recv where journal_id=#journalId# and tenant_id=#tenantId# and user_id=#userId#
insert.isEmpty:
insert into jmocha.tbl_journal_view (user_id,tenant_id,journal_id, view_date) select #userId#,#tenantId#,#journalId#,#viewDate# from dual where not exists( select journal_id from jmocha.tbl_journal where journal_id = #journalId# and journal_writer = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)
on duplicate key update tenant_id = #tenantId#
insert.isNotEmpty: update jmocha.tbl_journal_recv set recieve_date=#viewDate# where journal_id=#journalId# and tenant_id=#tenantId# and user_id=#userId#

sqlMap.select: select j.journal_id as journal_id, j.journal_title as journal_title, j.journal_content as journal_content, substring(j.journal_date,1,19) as journal_date, u.DISPLAYNAME as writer_name, f.form_name as form_name, f.type_id as type_id, count(jr.reply_id) as reply_count, count(r.user_id) as total_recv, count(r.recieve_date) as check_recv, f.form_id as form_id, j.dept_share as dept_share, jf.file_path as file_path, jf.file_size as file_size, jf.file_name as file_name ,case u.CN when #userId# then 'yes' else 'no' end as mine ,u.CN as writer_id from jmocha.tbl_journal j inner join jmocha.tbl_journal_form f on (j.form_id=f.form_id and j.tenant_id = f.tenant_id) inner join jmocha.tbl_usermaster u on (j.journal_writer=u.CN and u.TENANT_ID=j.tenant_id) left join jmocha.tbl_journal_file jf on (jf.journal_id=j.journal_id and jf.tenant_id=j.tenant_id) left join jmocha.tbl_journal_recv r on (r.journal_id=j.journal_id and r.tenant_id=j.tenant_id) left join jmocha.tbl_journal_reply jr on (jr.journal_id=j.journal_id and jr.tenant_id=j.tenant_id) where j.tenant_id=#tenantId# and j.journal_id=#journalId# group by 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,11,12,13,14,15,16
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_journal_file ( journal_id, file_path, file_size, file_name, tenant_id ) values ( #journalId#, #filePath#, #fileSize#, #fileName#, #tenantId# )
insert into tbl_journal_recv ( journal_id, user_id, tenant_id ) values ( #journalId#, #receiverId#, #tenantId# )
sqlMap.update:
update tbl_journal set journal_title = #title#, dept_share = #deptShare#, journal_content = #content#
,journal_status = "" ,journal_date = utc_timestamp()
,journal_date = utc_timestamp()
where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_file where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
delete from tbl_journal_recv where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
delete from tbl_journal where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_recv set recv_status = 'N' where user_id = #userId# and journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select r.reply_id as reply_id, r.reply_content as reply_content, substring(r.reply_date,1,16) as reply_date, u.DISPLAYNAME as reply_writer_name, u.CN as reply_writer, case u.CN when #userId# then 'Y' else 'N' end as mine from jmocha.tbl_journal_reply r inner join jmocha.tbl_usermaster u on(u.CN=r.reply_writer and u.TENANT_ID=r.tenant_id) where r.journal_id=#journalId# and r.tenant_id=#tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from jmocha.tbl_journal_reply where tenant_id = #tenantId# and reply_id = #replyId# and reply_writer = #userId# and journal_id = #journalId#
sqlMap.select: select count(b.user_id) as recvCount from tbl_usermaster a inner join tbl_journal_recv b on (a.CN = b.user_id and a.TENANT_ID = b.tenant_id) where b.journal_id = #journalId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#

select b.user_id as user_id, a.DISPLAYNAME as user_name, a.DESCRIPTION as dept_name, a.TITLE as jikwi, substring(ifnull(b.recieve_date, '-'),1,16) as date from tbl_usermaster a join tbl_journal_recv b on (a.CN = b.user_id and a.TENANT_ID = b.tenant_id) where b.journal_id = #journalId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#
limit #startCount#,#listCnt#

select count(u.cn) as viewCount from jmocha.tbl_journal_view v inner join jmocha.tbl_usermaster u on(v.tenant_id=u.TENANT_ID and u.CN=v.user_id) where v.journal_id=#journalId# and v.tenant_id =#tenantId#

select u.cn as user_id, u.DISPLAYNAME as user_name, u.DESCRIPTION as dept_name, u.TITLE as jikwi, substring(v.view_date,1,16) as date from jmocha.tbl_journal_view v inner join jmocha.tbl_usermaster u on(v.tenant_id=u.TENANT_ID and u.CN=v.user_id) where v.journal_id=#journalId# and v.tenant_id =#tenantId# limit #startCount#,#listCnt#
